latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $101,674 · day +0.40% · SPY -0.09% · alpha +0.49%
latest_messages.body: Quiet, no-trade day — and a good one. Deere led (+2.2%) and JPMorgan firmed to +5.7%, pulling us green while the market was flat, so we beat SPY by ~0.5pt today. Up +1.67% since we started. Still ~59% cash on purpose ahead of Friday's tariff deadline + AmEx earnings and next week's Fed meeting.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — up a touch early; holding cash until a better setup shows up
Pre-market plan: a real candidate (UnitedHealth) finally showed up — but not quite a buy
Open: no trades — a quiet, green open with all three stocks up
Pre-market plan: no buys (20th quiet scan) — lineup healthy; watching Lilly & Deere cushions at the open
Midday: steady, no changes — a quiet green-market day where we're sitting slightly behind, and that's fine
